line_1: Arm, arm! Ev'n now, the impatient charger neighs!
line_2: Again, from tent to tent the trumpet brays!

line_1: Responsive to the distant neigh he neighs,
line_2: No stops, till overleaping all delays,

line_1: Responsive to the distant neigh he neighs,
line_2: He finds the pasture where his fellows graze.
